issues.description: Effect grants ability to attack active Characters, which is 'CanAttackActive' keyword, not 'Unblockable'. 'Unblockable' means cannot be blocked; this card allows attacking active (untapped) characters.

Target scope is too broad. Card specifies 'Up to 1 of your {SWORD} type Leader or Character cards' – requires type filter and count limit (max 1). Current scope 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' lacks type restriction and selection limit.
Trigger should be 'OnPlay' (card effect activates when played), not 'Activated'. 'Activated' implies an optional cost-based ability.
